item.title: Why is Kabra Jewels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 04-Mar, Kabra Jewels Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 6.99% to close at ₹81.15. This drop reflects a continuation of a sustained downward trend that has seen the stock underperform both its sector and the broader market benchmarks over multiple time frames. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 04-Mar, Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.79% to close at ₹4,214.00. This drop comes despite the company’s robust financial performance and strong management metrics, highlighting a divergence between fundamentals and short-term market sentiment. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Fusion Finance Ltd falling/rising?
